name: ontobricks
description: OntoBricks is a web application that transforms Databricks tables into a materialized knowledge graph. It lets you design ontologies (OWL), map them to Unity Catalog tables via R2RML, materialize triples into a Delta triple store and graph DB, reason over the graph (OWL 2 RL, SWRL, SHACL), and query it through an auto-generated GraphQL API + MCP
